name: lime-stock-watchlist
description: Stock watchlist and back-in-stock notifications for WooCommerce

scripts.zip: bun run build && composer install --no-dev && rm -f lime-stock-watchlist.zip && rm -rf /tmp/lswl-dist && rsync -aq --exclude-from=.distignore --exclude='*.zip' . /tmp/lswl-dist/lime-stock-watchlist/ && sh -c 'cd /tmp/lswl-dist && zip -rq "$1" lime-stock-watchlist' _ "$(pwd)/lime-stock-watchlist.zip" && rm -rf /tmp/lswl-dist && composer install && echo 'Done: lime-stock-watchlist.zip'
